criteria.criterion: DBB-001: sense.detect(frame) returns faces array with position/confidence
DBB-004: sense.detect(null/undefined) throws or returns empty, no crash
DBB-005: memory.search('query') returns relevant memory fragments
DBB-006: memory.search with no match returns []
DBB-007: memory.search('') returns [] or readable error, no crash
DBB-008: concurrent memory writes preserve all entries
DBB-010: docker run -p 3000:3000 agentic-service → http://localhost:3000 returns 200
DBB-011: docker-compose up starts service on port 3000
DBB-012: SIGINT causes clean exit within 5s, exit code 0 or 130
